name: ibl-abp
description: IBL ABP Framework skill bundle for backend, MongoDB, multitenancy, React UI, and testing workflows.

interface.longDescription: IBL ABP packages reusable agent skills for ABP Framework projects: core conventions, feature scaffolding, MongoDB setup, multitenancy, React UI wiring, and integration testing.
